name: What proof do I need for my repetitive strain injury claim in Boise?
description: Medical link to job, reports, witnesses, work logs for repetitive injuries.[2]

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my repetitive strain injury claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical link to job, reports, witnesses, work logs for repetitive injuries.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove the injury occurred during employment with medical records, incident reports, witness statements, and work logs showing repetition.[2] Challenges arise for gradual onset like strains without acute event.[2] Key factors: (1) Doctor opinion linking to job duties; (2) Photos/diagrams of work area; (3) Consistent history across reports; (4) Disclose priors honestly.[2][9] Document symptoms daily, get work-related diagnosis, avoid inconsistencies. Strong evidence prevents denials.
